un.caen.model.player

Class PlayerProxy

  • java.lang.Object
    • un.caen.model.player.PlayerProxy

  • public class PlayerProxy
extends java.lang.Object
    The `PlayerProxy` class is a proxy for the `Player` class, which is part of the `un.caen.model.player` package. The `PlayerProxy` class provides a way to access and update the properties of a `Player` object without directly interacting with the `Player` class.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      PlayerProxy(Player player)
      Constructs a new `PlayerProxy` object with the properties of the given `Player` object.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      int getEnergy()
      Returns the energy level of the player.
      java.lang.String getName()
      Returns the name of the player.
      Position getPosition()
      Returns the position of the player.
      java.util.List<Weapon> getWeapons()
      Returns the list of weapons the player is carrying.
      void update(Player player)
      Updates the properties of the `PlayerProxy` object with the properties of the given `Player` object.

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Constructor Detail

      • PlayerProxy

        public PlayerProxy(Player player)
        Constructs a new `PlayerProxy` object with the properties of the given `Player` object.
        Parameters:
        player - the `Player` object to be proxied

    • Method Detail

      • update

        public void update(Player player)
        Updates the properties of the `PlayerProxy` object with the properties of the given `Player` object.
        Parameters:
        player - the `Player` object to be used for the update
